batch_objective: CRC_F2 operation (custom name, adjustable) — CRC32 IEEE region calculator/checker for Motorola S19/S3 firmware. Operator FR1-FR9 draft: accept S19 (incl. S3/32-bit), one+ hex memory ranges to CRC + per-range output address, polynomial/init/reverse-flag/final-XOR params, ascending-address sort, region filtering, gap-split contiguous-segment reconstruction (no gap byte insertion), segment-chained CRC (no reset between segments), final XOR, and a TWO-STAGE finalization: compare computed CRC vs value already in the specified memory region (check-only, default non-mutating), then on operator confirmation write the CRC into the output address and emit a modified S19 — surfaced in the s19_app report. Also the named A-4 census STRESS-TEST: CRC computation must NOT land in frozen core.py.
branch: claude/determined-curran-a4b557 (worktree off main; main already includes batch-11 PR #16)
batch_layout: Each batch archived under .dev-flow/<YYYY-MM-DD>-batch-NN/. Living docs (REQUIREMENTS.md, tests/, docs/diagrams/) kept current. On batch advance, the closing batch's state.json is snapshotted into its folder as state-snapshot-at-close.json before the shared state.json is trimmed to the new batch.
